concepts.title: semiconductor
concepts.quote: When a semiconductor photocatalyst absorbs a photon with energy greater than its band gap, an electron is promoted from the valence band to the conduction band, leaving a hole in the valence band.

concepts.title: photocatalyst
concepts.quote: When a semiconductor photocatalyst absorbs a photon with energy greater than its band gap, an electron is promoted from the valence band to the conduction band, leaving a hole in the valence band.
